name: ExtensionClaimResponse_ProcessNote_Type
title: R5: Note purpose additional types
description: R5: `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ClaimResponse.processNote.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ClaimResponse.processNote.type` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding.
